primary_issue.title: Align guru-team workflow with Trellis auto-bootstrap start model
primary_issue.reason: intake/handoff 主 issue，默认进入 close 候选。
acceptance_evidence: README.md 已将用户入口改为自然语言任务 / issue URL / issue number / trellis-continue / trellis-finish-work，并把 trellis-start 定位为 fallback / explicit orientation。
trellis/workflows/guru-team/workflow.md 与 .trellis/workflow.md 的 Request Triage、workflow-state:no_task、Rules 已明确 no active task 自然语言分类、issue intake + worktree preflight 和副作用 consent。
trellis/presets/guru-team/overlays 与本仓库 .agents/.codex 的 trellis-start overlay 已同步为 fallback orientation 文案。

close_issues.title: Align guru-team workflow with Trellis auto-bootstrap start model
close_issues.reason: 本任务完整解决 issue #2 中关于 guru-team workflow、README、preset overlay 的 auto-bootstrap 入口心智模型对齐。
acceptance_evidence: README.md、trellis/workflows/guru-team/README.md、trellis/presets/guru-team/README.md 已不再把 trellis-start 与 trellis-continue / trellis-finish-work 并列为用户必须记住的日常主入口。
workflow-state:no_task 已明确 issue URL、issue number、明确开发任务或文件改动会触发 Guru Team issue intake + Git base/worktree preflight。
旧口径残留搜索未命中：必须记住三个主入口、用户主流程仍然只有、entry points limited to start、normal Trellis start entry point、User primary entry points remain only。
